positional_bias.note: Re-derived correct positions from .gift for all 12 MCQ match sidecar correct_position_distribution exactly; short-answer q13/q14 correctly null.

length_bias.note: Correct-answer text (feedback stripped) comparable to distractors; no systematic longest/shortest tell.

distractor_plausibility.note: All 36 distractors encode named misconceptions from corpus 7 (truncate-toward-zero, n%2==1 for even, -2**2=4, left-to-right precedence, comparison-returns-int, first-link-only chaining, =/== reversed, or-before-and, exception-catching, -1/'False' as falsy). No score-1 distractors.

objective_coverage.note: All 5 LOs from corpus 3 tested: arithmetic incl negatives/modulo/** (q1,q2,q3,q13); precedence+parentheses incl -2**2 vs (-2)**2 (q4,q5,q6); comparison->bool+chaining+==vs= (q7,q8,q9); logical+precedence+short-circuit (q10,q11,q14); truthiness/falsy (q12).

scope_grounding.note: No forward references (no int()/str(), f-strings, if/while, match-case). Every question traceable to corpus 5.1-5.6.

verdict: Pass — positional 3/3/3/3 (max_share 0.25), length/plausibility clean, all 5 LOs covered, no forward references, sidecar matches .gift.
